caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and white headphones sits in a room with a light-colored wooden wall. He is wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt and is positioned in front of a black microphone. Behind him, a decorated Christmas tree with multicolored lights is visible on the left, and a framed picture displays the number "20" against a blue background. Across the sequence, the man is smiling and talking. He initially looks forward, and as the sequence progresses, he raises his right hand to make a peace sign while his smile widens into a laugh. The background remains static, and the camera angle stays fixed on him as he gestures and reacts.
